reviews.comment:
Went to Coffee Island with my friend just for a coffee, and it turned out to be a really nice experience. The place was quite busy with almost full seating, but the service was still smooth and well-managed.

The coffee was way too good, definitely the highlight of our visit. The ambience was pleasant as well. It felt a little dim and shady inside, but the outside seating was lively with beautiful lights, which created a great vibe.

reviews.comment:
The food here is quite nice and the coffee is also good. However, the service is extremely poor. The staff seem untrained and it’s very difficult to get their attention—you practically have to shout for someone to come take your order.

Either you have to go and place the order at the counter yourself or use their QR code ordering system, which unfortunately doesn’t work properly. I waited for around 20 minutes only to find out that my order was never placed because of some issue with their QR system.

Overall, it leads to a very bad experience despite the food being good. The management seriously needs to improve the service.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi,

We appreciate you sharing such detailed feedback. It’s good to know you enjoyed the food and coffee, and we’ve taken careful note of your experience with the service and ordering process. Your comments have been shared with our team as we review the workflow and the QR ordering system to ensure things run far more smoothly for our guests.

If you’re open to it, we’d really value connecting with you to understand more about your visit. Please feel free to DM us on Instagram @coffee.island.in or email us at hello@coffeeisland.in so we can take this forward.
